entries.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
entries.description: At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

entries.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
entries.description: Just for kicks, I took a look at Jersey Mike's IPO documents. Surely a sandwich shop would have no need to mention AI. But lo and behold.

entries.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
entries.description: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

entries.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
entries.description: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

entries.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
entries.description: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

entries.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
entries.description: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

entries.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
entries.description: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

entries.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
entries.description: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

entries.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
entries.description: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

entries.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
entries.description: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.
